basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Guwahati Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Guwahati (AIIMS Guwahati) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Assistant Professor (Contractual). Candidates with MD/MS Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 31-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through AIIMS Guwahati official website.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/MS or equivalent for Medical Candidates, M.Sc. (Medical Anatomy) and Ph.D. for Non-Medical Candidates

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Guwahati Assistant Professor (Contractual) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: All India Institute of Medical Sciences
